prompt: Create a realistic paparazzi-style street photograph of an elegant woman stepping out of the Four Seasons hotel entrance in a busy city. She is centered full-body, walking confidently from the curb toward the camera, wearing a fitted black short-sleeve wrap dress with a deep V neckline and a high thigh slit, black pointed-toe stiletto pumps, and carrying a small structured black handbag in her left hand. Her face is intentionally anonymized with a soft rectangular blur, while her medium brown shoulder-length hair is visible in natural sunlight. Surround her with exactly 3 hotel security or doorman figures on the left near the doorway and a dense crowd of photographers on the right holding cameras with flashes aimed at her. Include a glossy black luxury sedan parked at the curb on the right foreground with a partial European-style license plate. The background should show the Four Seasons entrance sign, stone architecture, doorway shadows, and bright midday sunlight casting strong realistic shadows on the pavement. Style: high-end celebrity candid photo, editorial realism, 35mm street photography, natural contrast, slight motion energy, no glamour retouching, vertical 3:4 composition.
